history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left interior cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The only open path from my position is downward, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell directly below me is an empty floor cell, which is the only safe way forward from this position. I should move into it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down with a clear floor cell directly below me. Continuing downward follows the open corridor and avoids the lava to my right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, and the cell directly below is open floor. Moving forward continues safely along the left corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below is an open floor cell. Advancing keeps me on the safe path toward the lower corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below is blocked by lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path continues to the right along this corridor, so I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right, and the cell ahead is open floor. Moving forward follows the clear corridor toward the goal side of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is still open, and continuing right keeps me on the only safe horizontal corridor toward the right side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right with another open floor cell ahead. Advancing continues along the safe path toward the opening near the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the next cell ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. To continue toward the goal, I should turn to look for the open path upward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Facing up, the cell directly ahead is open floor, and moving upward follows the safe corridor toward the goal side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
